title: escallonia × mollis
intro: Escallonia × mollis, also known as the Red Escallonia or Scarlet Escallonia, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Escalloniaceae family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems which are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Escallonia × mollis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Escallonia × mollis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
